items.title: Show HN: Chorus, a Mac app that lets you chat with a bunch of AIs at once
items.author: Charlieholtz
items.content:
There's so many cool models to try but they're all in different places. In Chorus you can chat with a bunch of models all at once, and add your own system prompts.

Like 4o with a CBT overview, or a succinct Claude. Excited to hear your thoughts!

items.title: Ask HN: Resources for general purpose GPU development on Apple's M* chips?
items.author: thinking_banana
items.content:
While Apple M* chips seems to have an incredible unified memory access, the available learning resources seem to be quite restricted and often convoluted. Has anyone been able to get past this barrier? I have some familiarity with general purpose software development with CUDA and C++. I want to figure how to work with/ use Apple's developer resources for general purpose programming.
